preReview.title: Charlotte FC contra Toronto FC: Smith aprovechando el impulso en busca de un lugar en los playoffs
preReview.description: Charlotte FC recibe a Toronto FC en el Bank of America Stadium este fin de semana, con la esperanza de consolidar aún más su lugar en los playoffs de la MLS.

preReview.title: Charlotte FC v Toronto FC: Smith cavalca il momento positivo per cercare il posto nei playoff
preReview.description: Charlotte FC accoglie il Toronto FC al Bank of America Stadium questo weekend, sperando di consolidare ulteriormente il loro posto nei playoff MLS.

preReview.title: Charlotte FC x Toronto FC: Smith aproveita o momento em busca de vaga nos playoffs
preReview.description: Charlotte FC recebe o Toronto FC no Bank of America Stadium neste fim de semana, esperando consolidar ainda mais sua posição nos playoffs da MLS.

preReview.title: Charlotte FC v Toronto FC: Smith riding momentum in pursuit of playoff place
preReview.description: Charlotte FC welcome Toronto FC to the Bank of America Stadium this weekend, hoping to further cement their place in the MLS playoffs.

preReview.title: Charlotte FC contre Toronto FC : Smith surfe sur la vague de l'élan vers les playoffs
preReview.description: Charlotte FC accueille Toronto FC au Bank of America Stadium ce week-end, espérant consolider davantage leur place dans les playoffs de la MLS.

preReview.title: Charlotte FC gegen Toronto FC: Smith reitet auf der Welle des Aufschwungs auf der Jagd nach einem Playoff-Platz
preReview.description: Charlotte FC begrüßt Toronto FC an diesem Wochenende im Bank of America Stadium, in der Hoffnung, ihren Platz in den MLS-Playoffs weiter zu festigen.

preReview.title: شارلوت إف سي ضد تورونتو إف سي: سميث يركب الزخم في السعي للحصول على مكان في التصفيات
preReview.description: ترحب شارلوت إف سي بفريق تورونتو إف سي في ملعب بنك أمريكا هذا الأسبوع، على أمل تعزيز مكانهم في التصفيات في الدوري الأمريكي الممتاز.

preReview.title: Charlotte FC x Toronto FC: Smith aproveita o embalo na busca por uma vaga nos playoffs
preReview.description: Charlotte FC recebe o Toronto FC no Bank of America Stadium neste fim de semana, esperando consolidar ainda mais sua vaga nos playoffs da MLS.
